description: CompositionWhite, red and navy blue printed kurta made of 100% cotton, has a round neck, yoke on the chest with embroidery, bead and sequins work, lace detailing around the yoke, buttoned chest placket, three quarter sleeves with elasticated cuffs, yoke at the back and a vented hemFitRegularWash careWash separately in cold waterDo not bleachDry in shadeWarm iron; do not iron on decorationsThe embroidery with bead and sequins work on this kurta from biba is subtly stylish and adds to your femininity while the soft cotton keeps you in exemplary comfort all day. Wear this over leggings. Smart enough to wear to the office or to a formal party, dress this kurta up by wearing bold earrings and bangles.Model statisticsThe product is a size 36 on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
